title: New Republic Army
content:
{{Top|canon=New Republic army}} {{Organization |image=[[File:RebelVictoryAtCoruscant.jpg]] |name=New Republic Army |type= |founder= |leader=*[[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] **[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] {{C|[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]- [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]}} *[[New Republic Defense Force Army Command]] |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=Throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] |formed=[[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] |founded=[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] |fragmented= |reorganized=*[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] {{C|Integrated into [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]}} *[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] {{C|as the [[Galactic Alliance Army]]}} |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} The '''New Republic Army''' was a segment of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] that served as the ground military of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was formed from the [[Alliance Army/Legends|ground forces]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] after the New Republic was established. ==History== Formed from the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]], the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForces]] were re-purposed as [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] to seize bridgeheads during [[Planetary assault tactics|planetary assaults]], while the bulk of the Army was to be used for occupation and peacekeeping duties. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], the Army won a protracted three-month [[Milagro campaign|battle on Milagro]] against the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] the army [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberated]] Coruscant under the command of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], General [[Rand Talor]], and General [[Brenn Tantor]]. The New Republic Army suffered heavy losses fighting against the [[Dark Empire]] in [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. Following the post-[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] reorganization of the New Republic Defense Force, the Army was abolished and its defense responsibilities transferred to the [[Planetary Security Forces]], while the [[New Republic Marine]]s took over the planetary assault role under the command of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|naval]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]] as part of a fully-integrated Defense Force. After the formation of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the Army was reformed as the [[Galactic Alliance Army]]. ==Vehicles == Comprising of [[Rebel combat speeder|combat speeders]], [[Rebel attack tank|attack tanks]], [[T1-B hovertank]]s, [[T3-B heavy attack tank]]s, [[Hover Transport TC9]]s, [[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher]]s, [[Tracked Mobile Base]]s, [[Scanner Jammer]]s, and [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]]. ==Troop variants== The common infantry was the [[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic trooper]]. Other variants included [[Missile Trooper (Rebel)|Missile Troopers]], which specialized in missile launchers and demolition expertise. [[Scout Soldier]]s, used for protecting worlds and quelling riots. [[Sea Commando]]s, elite commandos trained in aquatic warfare. [[Thermal detonator trooper (Rebel Alliance)|Mortar Troopers]], specializing in providing cover fire, acting as support units. [[New Republic Marine]]s, specializing in massive, planetary assaults. Used exclusively by [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. [[New Republic Honor Guard]]s, tasked with the protection of the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]. [[Palace Guard (New Republic)|Palace Guards]], are to ensure security within the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]]. [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Protectors]], ally forces often helping the New Republic. Assisted in the [[Battle of Mindor|Battle of]] [[Mindor/Legends|Mindor]]. ==Weaponry== [[A280 blaster rifle/Legends|A280 blaster rifles]], [[DH-17 blaster rifle/Legends|DH-17 blaster rifles]], [[DH-17 blaster pistol/Legends|DH-17 blaster pistols]], [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistols]], [['aKraB clip-point vibrodagger/Legends|AKraB vibrodaggers]], [[Mortar/Legends|mortars]], [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]], [[blast cannon]]s. Explosives included [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]], [[7-PrG proton grenade]]s, [[C-16 fragmentation grenade]]s. ==Units== *[[Commando Team One]] *[[Katarn Commandos]] *[[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] *[[Eclipse Team]] *[[42nd Republican Guard Assault Division]] *[[Republican Guard]] *[[Guile Company]] *[[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic trooper]] *[[New Republic Marine]] {{Nr-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] *''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' *''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]] *''[[Champions of the Force]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' *''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Mercy Kill (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] *''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' *''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox| |title=[[New Republic Army]] |years=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]–[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]
